metadata.title: Datepicker
metadata.description: Use a date picker to modify and insert date/time anywhere in your markdown notes.

regex.source: Notice("Please enter a valid date and time")
regex.target: Notice("请输入有效日期和时间")
Notice("未找到下一个日期/时间")
Notice("未找到上一个日期/时间")
Notice("请输入有效的日期/时间")

regex.source: "Use date format when modifying existing dates"
regex.target: "修改现有日期时使用日期格式"

regex.source: "Choose your preferred date format for inserting new dates"
regex.target: "选择您偏好的日期格式以插入新日期"

regex.source: "Use the selected date format when modifying existing dates"
regex.target: "修改现有日期时使用所选的日期格式"

regex.source: 'Insert time in 24 hour format when performing "Insert new time" and "Insert new date and time" commands'
regex.target: "执行'插入新时间'和'插入新日期和时间'命令时，以24小时格式插入时间"

regex.source: "Shows a button with a calendar icon associated with date values, select it to open the picker (Reloading Obsidian may be required)"
regex.target: "显示与日期值关联的带有日历图标的按钮，选择它以打开选择器（可能需要重新加载Obsidian）"

regex.source: "Shows a button with a clock icon associated with time values, select it to open the picker (Reloading Obsidian may be required)"
regex.target: "显示与时间值关联的带有时钟图标的按钮，选择它以打开选择器（可能需要重新加载Obsidian）"

regex.source: "Datepicker will show automatically whenever a date/time value is selected"
regex.target: "每当选择日期/时间值时，日期选择器将自动显示"

regex.source: "Will automatically apply edits made to the date when the datepicker closes or loses focus"
regex.target: "当日期选择器关闭或失去焦点时，将自动应用对日期所做的编辑"

regex.source: "Immediately show the calendar when the datepicker opens"
regex.target: "当日期选择器打开时立即显示日历"

regex.source: "Automatically focus the datepicker whenever the datepicker opens"
regex.target: "每当日期选择器打开时自动聚焦日期选择器"

regex.source: "Focuses the datepicker when the down arrow keyboard key is pressed"
regex.target: "当按下向下箭头键时聚焦日期选择器"

regex.source: "Automatically select the entire date/time text when a date/time is selected"
regex.target: "当选择日期/时间时自动选择整个日期/时间文本"
